articles.title: The fittest founder in the room got cancer. Here’s how he used AI to fight back.
articles.description: When confronted with cancer, Connor Christou fed everything tied tied to his regime — blood results, scan data, wearable output, journal entries — into Claude.

articles.title: Binance founder CZ blames crypto's sour 2026 on mix of AI, global tension, 4-year cycle
articles.description: There is no single cause for the crypto market's 50% decline over the past year, the Binance founder told CoinDesk.

articles.title: Strategy's valuation has fallen below the value of its bitcoin holdings
articles.description: For years, investors had valued the firm well above its bitcoin holdings, giving Strategy massive flexibility to raise capital as needed — a situation Michael Saylor and team took full advantage of.

articles.title: SecondFi targets two-week recovery after Cardano wallet exploit
articles.description: SecondFi says it has completed forensic investigations, taken a final balance snapshot and is preparing to return assets.

articles.title: Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like  models as Anthropic’s export ban drags on
articles.description: New models are launching in Asia that promise Mythos-like capabilities without fear of an export ban. U.S. AI labs may never recover this enormous market.

articles.title: Ripple CEO stays bullish on bitcoin but says Saylor's strategy has hurt crypto
articles.description: Ripple's Brad Garlinghouse called Strategy's preferred-stock funding model "financial engineering" that distracted the market, pointing to STRC's slide to a record low as the evidence. He runs the company behind XRP, a bitcoin rival.

articles.title: Dogecoin and Hyperliquid's HYPE led weekly crypto losses as AI stocks lure buyers
articles.description: A rotation out of chipmakers lifted much of the stock market, with the equal-weight S&P 500 at a record. Crypto was not part of it. Ether fell 8% on the week and the memecoins dropped harder.

articles.title: Securitize expects to raise $400M ahead of public debut
articles.description: Securitize says less than 30% of shareholders in the acquisition firm taking it public elected to redeem, giving it an expected $400 million on its upcoming debut.
